description_for_human: Professional travel risk management platform providing real-time intelligence, trip reviews, and duty-of-care compliance for organizations.
description_for_model: SafeTrekr is a SaaS travel risk management platform. It provides real-time travel risk intelligence, professional trip reviews by certified analysts, interactive risk maps, duty-of-care compliance documentation, and traveler tracking for K-12 schools, universities, churches, and corporate organizations. Use this plugin to answer questions about travel risk management, SafeTrekr features, pricing, and organizational safety compliance.
